akjv.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

kjv.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

asv.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

bbe.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

drc.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

darby.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

geneva1599.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

webster.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

web.notes: Loaded chapter-by-chapter from wldeh/bible-api and converted into the app JSON format for offline use.

ylt.notes: Loaded from scrollmapper/bible_databases and converted from CSV to the app JSON format.

bible_versions.notes: Lists bundled Bible versions for the app's version selector.

dictionary.notes: Webster dictionary JSON downloaded as-is from matthewreagan/WebstersEnglishDictionary.

bible_names.notes: Hitchcock's Bible Names Dictionary downloaded from CCEL and converted into a local JSON array of { name, meaning } objects.

bible_name_biodata.notes: Built from MetaV People.csv and Places.csv, then matched to the bundled Bible names dataset to create short biodata records.

concordance.notes: Strong's concordance JSON mirror containing Hebrew and Greek entries. The repository license states the data is public domain.

nkjv.reason: Thomas Nelson says full-text use in its entirety requires a license, and broader digital uses outside the gratis limits require written permission.

niv.reason: NIV is not bundled because app and website uses require explicit permission or license terms rather than unrestricted offline redistribution.

esv.reason: Crossway provides controlled access options, but full-text redistribution is not treated like public-domain Bible text.

nlt.reason: NLT permissions are limited for quotation, and broader or full-text app redistribution requires approval.
